name: Edible Craft Dough Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 30 minutes
1. Cream butter and shortening in a large bowl until smooth.
2. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add egg yolks, baking soda, cream of tartar, and vanilla extract; beat until combined.
4. Gradually mix in flour until the dough is smooth and holds together when formed into a ball.
5. Divide the dough into four equal portions.
6. Color one portion red, one yellow, one green, and leave the remaining portion plain.
7. Wrap each color separately in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Roll out chilled dough on a lightly floured surface until it is about ¼-inch thick.
10. Use cookie cutters to shape the dough into desired designs or cookies.
11. Place the shaped cookies onto ungreased baking sheets.
12. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until edges are golden brown.
13. Allow cookies to cool on baking sheets for 1-2 minutes before transferring them to wire racks to cool completely.
Yield: Approximately 5-½ dozen cookies.
